parameters.query:
-- HCP Namely org data (all active employees + their manager via self-join).
-- Unquoted aliases return UPPERCASE column names from Snowflake; the Aggregate
-- node reads them in UPPERCASE to match.
SELECT
  e.profile_id AS employee_id,
  CONCAT(e.first_name, ' ', e.last_name) AS full_name,
  e.email,
  e.department,
  SPLIT_PART(e.division, ':', 3) AS sub_team,
  e.job_title AS title,
  p.start_date AS hire_date,
  CONCAT(m.first_name, ' ', m.last_name) AS manager_name,
  m.email AS manager_email
FROM production.namely.people_vw e
LEFT JOIN production.namely.profiles p ON e.profile_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN production.namely.people_vw m ON e.reports_to_id = m.profile_id
WHERE e.user_status = 'active'
ORDER BY e.department, full_name

snowflake.name: SHARED ANALYTICS SNOWFLAKE PROD_N8N_SVC READ ONLY CREDENTIAL
